model: v20clean 3-seed club ensemble + v21goal blend w=0.65 (lineup-aware)
confirmed_lineup_note: Both XIs 11/11 from ESPN summary (event 401891933) minutes before kickoff; prediction run on confirmed lineups.

bets.staking_method: Recommended EUR4 at the 4.00 threshold quote before the actual price was known; placed at 4.35 with stake unchanged (user-directed). Formula at 4.35 would give halfKelly 3.38% x EUR193.43 = EUR6.54 -> EUR7; stake stays EUR4 as recommended.

excluded_legs_note: Home and away wins skipped by explicit data-defect call: Austria Wien's player data in our set is 2022-vintage (most of their confirmed XI unmatched, 15/22 across the match), so the model likely underrates them — Liepāja-win 'value' judged a blind spot, not edge. Draw leg is the least exposed to that bias.
provenance_note: Prediction generated pre-kickoff from confirmed XIs (session artifacts); bet placed at Unibet around kickoff; this commit logged minutes AFTER kickoff (~15:0xZ), before any result information. Not a pre-kickoff-proof pick per the strict standard.
settlement_note: Full Time 0-2 (ESPN event 401891933) -- Austria Wien won, draw bet lost. Confirms the pre-match caveat that stale Austria Wien data likely underrated them.
